api_key.label: OpenSubtitles API Key
api_key.description: The API key for your OpenSubtitles.com consumer (API application). Required.

username.label: Username
username.description: Your OpenSubtitles.com username. Optional — providing login credentials raises download limits (and unlocks VIP limits for VIP accounts).

password.label: Password
password.description: Your OpenSubtitles.com password. Optional; only used together with the username above.

language.label: Subtitle language
language.description: Preferred subtitle language as an ISO 639-1 code (e.g. en, es, fr). Optional; default en.

format.label: Subtitle format
format.description: Preferred subtitle format (srt, sub, ass, etc.). Optional; default srt.
